title: GrowGeneration Preannounces Record Full-Year 2020 Revenues and Increases Preliminary 2021 Guidance
text: GrowGeneration 2020 Full Year and 2021 Guidance. 2020 Full Year: Record revenues of $193.0 million vs $79.7 million in 2019 (143% increase). Adjusted EBITDA: $19.2 million vs $5.3 million in 2019. Strong performance driven by cannabis industry growth and consumer demand. 2021 Preliminary Guidance: Increased significantly to $335-350 million based on strong momentum. Adjusted EBITDA expected around $31.5-33.5 million. Dramatic guidance increases reflected company's ability to exceed forecasts. Growth driven by continued demand for hydroponic products, proprietary brands expansion, and retail location growth. Strong cash position enabled continued acquisitions and organic growth investments.
